title: A Boat Ride to Nowhere

scenes.text: A boat trip turned into a mystery when three lives were changed forever.
It happened in Cape Cod, Massachusetts.
In 2018, a fishing trip ended in tragedy as three men vanished without a trace off the coast.
Search efforts for the missing fishermen have continued, but they remain lost at sea.
The fate of the three fishermen remains unknown until today.
scenes.label: UNSOLVED DISAPPEARANCE

scenes.text: Follow for the cases that were never solved.

description: 📍 Cape Cod, USA - 2018. Three fishermen vanish without a trace during a fishing trip, leaving a mystery that remains unsolved. Follow for daily cold cases!
